meaning: adj.谷类的,乡下味的,粗野的,有鸡眼的
examples: I know it sounds corny, but I'm really not motivated by money.
I know it sounds corny, but it really was love at first sight!
The dialogue and acting in Indecent Proposal are tired, clichéd and corny.
And that might sound corny, but it really is the way he approaches it.
As old fashioned or corny as it may sound I have my set of standards.
